title: Miners Dreamed
description: This mod adds the miner's dream from the old orespawn mod!
body:
# **Miners Dream!**

Welcome to the revival of an old favorite! This mod brings back the iconic Miners Dream from the legendary OreSpawn mod, now updated and polished for modern Minecraft versions. Whether you're a veteran Minecrafter who remembers the good old days or a newcomer looking for a powerful mining tool, this mod has you covered.

**Features:**

Miners Dream: Clear out massive tunnels, reveal ores, and take your mining to the next level with this classic too!







**Future Plans:**

This is just the beginning! Stay tuned for future updates where I'll be adding new content! Expect new tools, items, and blocks!
